detail.description:
"Sakitei ~A Solo Flower Business~" is a relaxing social game featuring gardening simulation and management. You can grow and harvest hundreds of types of flowers in the game, freely combine them to create beautiful floral arrangements, and decorate your own flower shop and garden with various themed decorations.

Simply enjoy growing and harvesting flowers, and realistic bouquets will be delivered to your home. Turn the romance of gaming into reality!

〓 Flower Arrangement 〓
After harvesting vib
